recommendations.title: Head Full of Honey
recommendations.overview: Before eleven years old Tilda's parents can put her beloved grandfather in an old people's home due to his progressing Alzheimer disease, she takes him on one last adventure that subliminally threatens to tear her family apart.

recommendations.title: Rabbit Without Ears 2
recommendations.overview: Two years have passed. There is a normal life, but handsome Ludo meets his old love, and Anna is very jealous...

recommendations.title: Rabbit Without Ears
recommendations.overview: Rainbow press reporter Ludo is sentenced to 8 months, but is released on probation. But he has to work 300 hours for a local daycare center and meets Anna who has unfinished business with him.

recommendations.title: Kokowääh 2
recommendations.overview: Who said a patchwork family is without problems? Two years after the turbulence of Kokowääh, everyday life turns to everyday chaos…

recommendations.title: Kokowääh

recommendations.title: 1½ Ritter - Auf der Suche nach der hinreißenden Herzelinde
recommendations.overview: The story of Lanze who is in love with the princess. One day the princess is kidnapped by the Dark Knight and Lanze starts his journey to rescue her. But he is not alone because Erdal, a turk, joins him on his journey.
recommendations.director: Christof Wahl, Torsten Künstler, Til Schweiger

recommendations.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
recommendations.overview: A lonely 40-ish man, likely to remain a bachelor, has a chance to find the love of his life when he falls for a vivacious young woman.

recommendations.title: The Guardians

recommendations.title: Not My Day
recommendations.overview: When Banker Till (Axel Stein) is kidnapped during a bank robbery, he has the time of his life...

recommendations.title: Barefoot
